## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 short points.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run check:examples`
- [ ] `npm run check:fixtures` if markdown normalization or fixtures changed

## Scope

Which areas does this touch?

- [ ] `src/core`
- [ ] `src/cli`
- [ ] `src/config`
- [ ] docs / examples

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to?
